title: Chapter 90
content:
Chapter 90: Chapter 90: Noble Woman

"This," Su Mei announced, placing a possessive hand on Kai’s lower back and pushing him gently forward into the light, "is my new personal assistant, Kai. He will be working here at the Pavilion to help with our... heavier tasks."

The room erupted into a flurry of breathless whispers and sultry giggles.

Kai immediately knew what he had to do. He couldn’t act like the arrogant, dominant predator he truly was—not yet. That would scare them. They were noblewomen; they wanted something they could play with. Something they could corrupt.

He invoked his

Charisma 13 and completely altered his demeanor.

Kai lowered his head, his broad shoulders hunching just a fraction. He let a bright, highly convincing blush creep up his neck and spread across his cheeks. He looked at the floor, occasionally darting nervous, wide-eyed glances at the half-naked women surrounding him, acting completely overwhelmed by the sheer volume of exposed flesh.

"H-hello, my ladies," Kai stammered, his voice sounding incredibly boyish and shy. He bowed awkwardly. "It is... it is an honor to meet you all."

The reaction was instantaneous and devastating.

"Oh my heavens!" squealed Madam Lin, a slightly older, incredibly thick aristocratic woman lounging on a daybed. She sat up so fast her sheer purple robe slipped entirely off her right shoulder, exposing a massive, veiny breast to the open air. "Look at him! He’s blushing! He is absolutely adorable!"

"He’s so big and muscular, yet so incredibly shy," cooed another woman, standing up from the pool. Water cascaded down her lush, naked curves as she walked toward him, the wet silk clinging to the deep, plunging crack of her jiggly ass. "It’s like finding an untouched mountain tiger."

They began to stand up and flock toward him, abandoning their baths and massages.

Kai stood frozen in the center of the room, playing the part of the terrified virgin perfectly. He kept his eyes cast down, though from his angle, he was treated to a buffet of massive, bouncing cleavages, wet nipples, and the dark shadows of shaved pussies visible through thin silk.

"Oh, Master, you are such a brilliant liar,"

Ahena giggled telepathically.

The invisible Demoness floated right in front of him, resting her hands on her own hips. She leaned in, her glowing yellow eyes filled with filthy amusement. She stuck her long tongue out and slowly, agonizingly licked the shell of Kai’s ear. He felt the phantom, icy wetness, but he couldn’t react.

"Look at these pathetic cows,"

Ahena whispered directly into his brain.

"They think you are a little lamb. They have no idea that the monster standing in front of them is going to stretch their noble holes until they beg for death."

A ring of beautiful, rich women formed around him.

Lady Feng was the first to close the distance. She stepped right up to Kai, her heavy, wet breasts practically brushing against his Academy uniform. The scent of her expensive jasmine oils mixed with the raw, heavy musk of her arousal.

"Don’t be shy, little Kai," Lady Feng whispered, reaching out with a wet, manicured hand.

She gently touched his chest, letting her fingers trail down the hard, chiseled muscles beneath his shirt. Kai let out a perfectly timed, shaky breath, making his chest heave.

"Ah..." Kai gulped, refusing to meet her eyes. "M-my lady... you are very close..."

"Am I?" Lady Feng laughed, stepping even closer. She looked over her shoulder at Su Mei. "Su Mei, you absolute wicked genius. You brought us a fresh, untouched peach. Where did you find him?"

"He is the son of a dear friend," Su Mei replied, crossing her arms under her massive breasts. She smiled, though a faint, territorial spark flashed in her dark eyes as she watched the women paw at the boy who had just brought her to a screaming climax in her carriage. "His family fell on hard times. So, I am taking him under my wing to teach him the ways of the world."

Madam Lin squeezed into the circle, placing a plump hand on Kai’s strong bicep. She squeezed the muscle, letting out a soft, appreciative moan.

"Well, Su Mei," Madam Lin purred, her eyes dropping to the thick, undeniable bulge resting in Kai’s trousers. "I have a terrible knot in my shoulders. And my lower back is aching dreadfully. Do you think your new assistant would be willing to... practice his techniques on me?"

Kai looked up, his face still flushed, his eyes wide with feigned innocence.

"I... I would try my best, my lady," Kai stuttered, his voice trembling perfectly. "But... but I have never touched a noblewoman before. I wouldn’t want to do anything wrong."

The collective groan of pure, unadulterated lust that echoed through the Lotus Spring Room was deafening. The sight of this massive, incredibly handsome boy completely flustered by their bodies was driving them insane.

"They want to eat you alive, Master,"

Ahena laughed, floating above the circle of women, looking down at the feast.

"Which one are we going to break first?"
